display_name: Nighttime Whispers in the Echoing Woods

self_conditional_modifiers_json.description: 4pc: After using an Elemental Skill, gain 20% Geo DMG Bonus for 10s. While under a Crystallize-reaction shield or near Lunar-Crystallize Moondrifts during that window, the bonus is increased by 150% (to 50% Geo DMG total); the additional increase disappears 1s after the condition is no longer met.
